name: Create EM Spectrum Reference Chart
description: Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart serving as a reference for the Electromagnetic Spectrum. The flipchart must include an overview page titled "The Electromagnetic Spectrum" with a brief description, a full spectrum diagram page with seven labeled bands (Radio, Microwave, Infrared, Visible, Ultraviolet, X-ray, Gamma) and wavelength direction indicators, a visible light detail page showing the color spectrum (Red to Violet) with its wavelength range, and an applications page listing real-world uses for at least four bands. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/em_spectrum_reference.flipchart.
